name: Will my boss fire me for complaining about bad air at work?

mainEntity.name: Will my boss fire me for complaining about bad air at work?

acceptedAnswer.text: Illegal; file OSHA complaint for protection and remedies.
acceptedAnswer.description:
**No, retaliation for safety complaints or claims is illegal under OSHA and state law.**

Protected activity includes reporting hazards, filing comp[1][5]. Utah/Idaho ban reprisals; remedies include backpay, reinstatement[1].

- Document all communications.
- File OSHA charge if retaliated.
- Comp filing also protected.

Keep records; report to OSHA immediately if issues arise. Courts side with employees[1][5].

description: Illegal; file OSHA complaint for protection and remedies.
